name: ryl
description: Fast Rust-based YAML linter with real-time diagnostics, auto-fix, and formatting, powered by the ryl language server.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: ryl runs a local executable. In untrusted workspaces it uses only the binary bundled with this extension and ignores workspace-configured executable and config paths.

virtualWorkspaces.description: ryl is not supported in virtual workspaces because it runs as a local executable over the file system.

ryl.enable.description: Enable the ryl language server. When disabled, linting stops and existing diagnostics are cleared.

ryl.path.markdownDescription: Path to the `ryl` executable. When empty, ryl is resolved in order from the workspace virtual environment (`.venv`/`venv`), the system `PATH`, then the binary bundled with this extension. A leading `~` expands to your home directory; a relative path resolves against the first workspace folder.

enumDescriptions: Prefer the ryl found in your environment (workspace or PATH), falling back to the bundled binary.
Always use the ryl binary bundled with this extension, ignoring any environment installation.
ryl.importStrategy.markdownDescription: Whether to prefer the `ryl` found in your environment or always use the version bundled with this extension. Ignored when `#ryl.path#` is set.

ryl.configPath.markdownDescription: Path to a ryl configuration file (`ryl.toml`, `.ryl.toml`, or a yamllint-style config). When empty, ryl discovers configuration from the workspace as it would on the command line.

ryl.fixOnSave.markdownDescription: Apply all ryl safe fixes when saving a YAML file. For finer control, prefer `"editor.codeActionsOnSave": { "source.fixAll.ryl": "explicit" }`.

ryl.trace.server.description: Trace the communication between VS Code and the ryl language server.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run check-types
